data.title: Write RED test: sprint SKILL.md Phase 4 MAX_ATTEMPTS dispatch parsing structural boundary
data.description:
## Story
d853-bf07 — Sub-agent retry budget with model escalation

## Goal
Write a failing (RED) structural boundary test that validates the sprint SKILL.md Phase 4 dispatch logic correctly references MAX_ATTEMPTS parsing before the logic is added.

## Test File
tests/skills/test-sprint-retry-budget-dispatch.sh

## Test Cases (≥3 required)
1. **test_sprint_phase4_max_attempts_parsing** — Sprint SKILL.md Phase 4 mentions parsing MAX_ATTEMPTS from task descriptions (structural boundary: "MAX_ATTEMPTS" appears in Phase 4 section)
2. **test_sprint_phase4_lists_parsed_fields** — Phase 4 dispatch logic explicitly lists the fields it reads from task descriptions including MAX_ATTEMPTS
3. **test_sprint_phase4_sonnet_opus_escalation** — Phase 4 describes sonnet→opus escalation protocol triggered by retry budget exhaustion

## Acceptance Criteria
- Test file exists and is executable
- All test cases FAIL before implementation (RED)
- All test cases PASS after implementation (GREEN)
- Follows behavioral-testing-standard.md Rule 5: structural boundary only

## .test-index
After creating this file, add entry to .test-index:
  plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md → tests/skills/test-sprint-retry-budget-dispatch.sh [test_sprint_phase4_max_attempts_parsing]

## Files to Modify
- tests/skills/test-sprint-retry-budget-dispatch.sh (CREATE)
- .test-index (UPDATE — add RED marker for sprint/SKILL.md)
